bouquets.name: Peach Meadow
bouquets.description: Soft peach blooms gathered with airy greenery for a warm, sunlit feel. Each stem is hand-selected to bring a gentle glow to any room.

bouquets.name: Blush Romance
bouquets.description: Delicate blush petals arranged to whisper tenderness and grace. Chosen fresh to keep their soft, romantic charm for days.

bouquets.name: Pastel Garden
bouquets.description: A relaxed mix of pastel blossoms that feels freshly picked from the garden. Light, fragrant, and full of natural movement.

bouquets.name: Tulip Charm
bouquets.description: Crisp seasonal tulips bundled for a bright, cheerful statement. Each stem is picked at its peak for lasting freshness.

bouquets.name: Berry Bloom
bouquets.description: Rich berry tones layered with lush foliage for depth and warmth. Composed to feel both bold and quietly inviting.

bouquets.name: Sweet Whisper
bouquets.description: Gentle blooms in the softest hues, arranged to feel calm and serene. Hand-tied with care to preserve their quiet beauty.

bouquets.name: Field Joy
bouquets.description: A wild, free-spirited gathering of meadow flowers and greens. Each stem captures the easy charm of an open field.

bouquets.name: Soft Bloom
bouquets.description: Light, full blossoms arranged for a delicate, understated elegance. Selected to radiate freshness and gentle grace.
